entries.summary: Phase 6 complete — test fixtures (word-sample.txt/clean.txt) created, charmap fixes (full-width ASCII, \u2011, fixture space), sanitizer.test.js fixture test added, smoke.test.js created with IPC/security/performance tests. Multiple fix iterations for charmap (full-width codepoints, \u2011), fixtures (space handling), smoke test (IPC verification via source reading, network blocker regex). Total test count: 131 sanitizer tests + 12 smoke tests.
lessons_learned: Full-width ASCII uppercase E is \uFF25, not \uFF29 (which is I) — test_engineer correctly caught this
CHARMAP entries must handle full-width ASCII A-Z and a-z explicitly because NFKC doesn't normalize case correctly for some codepoints
Regular space (U+0020) before a fraction is NOT consumed by CHARMAP — only NBSP (U+00A0) is converted to space; fixture input must not have regular space before fraction
Network blocker regex in smoke test had extra colon — \:\/\/ matched wrong pattern
Smoke tests for Electron behaviors (app launch, clipboard IPC) require a display environment — static source verification is the best we can do in headless

entries.summary: Phase 6 complete: All renderer logic wired. loadDocxFile with arrayBuffer, drag-drop events, file input handler, onOpenFile IPC listener, autoRun integration into runSanitize and pasteFromClipboard. Zero revisions across 4 tasks.
lessons_learned: autoRun flag must be reset BEFORE copyOutput() call to prevent re-trigger if copyOutput ever chains to sanitize
early-return guard in runSanitize() must NOT touch autoRun — let the caller manage the flag
pasteFromClipboard had no auto-copy before — adding autoRun=true is an intentional UX enhancement
mammoth bundle is ~510KB — expected for a .docx parsing library, not a bug
declare_scope bug still present — workaround: skip it and delegate directly

entries.summary: Phase 6 Renderer Logic completed cleanly. 4 tasks (6.1-6.4): mammoth integration, drag-and-drop, file picker, onOpenFile IPC, autoRun auto-copy. Zero revisions, zero reviewer rejections, zero test failures.
lessons_learned: Curator must verify events.jsonl has a phase_complete entry — agents may finish without recording
Phase with no curator_analyze dispatched is invisible to tracking but still needs retro bundle
